message:
test(logging): add 33 property-based tests for logging module (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Cover LogLevel total order (reflexive, antisymmetric, transitive, total,
canonical rank), FromStr case-insensitivity and error messages, LogFormat
Display↔FromStr and serde roundtrips, LogConfig serde fidelity and
defaults stability, and Copy/Clone/Debug trait invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
